note: Top consumer 3D printers with build volumes, nozzles, AMS/multicolor capacity, and slicer quality presets. Maintained in-repo; update via the printer-db-research workflow.

printers.bed_type: PEI-coated spring steel / textured magnetic flexible plate
printers.notes: Bowden-fed Cartesian (i3-style) high-speed FDM printer. Recommended print speed ~150 mm/s, max ~250 mm/s. LeviQ 2.0 auto-leveling, 4.3-inch touchscreen, filament runout + power-loss resume. The base Kobra 2 has NO multi-material/AMS support and is single-color only. Slicer profiles in OrcaSlicer are shared with the Kobra 2 Neo (same 220x220x250mm class / 0.4mm hotend). The Kobra 2 Pro/Plus/Max are larger/faster siblings, not covered here. 1.75mm filament.

printers.bed_type: Textured PEI magnetic flexible spring-steel plate
printers.notes: Bowden-fed Cartesian high-speed FDM (max 600 mm/s, ~300 mm/s typical). Direct-drive-style dual-gear extruder, LeviQ 3.0 auto-leveling, vibration compensation. Build volume listed as 250x250x260mm (V1; V2 ~255x255x260mm). Multi-color via Anycubic ACE Pro 'color box' which holds 4 spools = 4 colors; chaining TWO ACE Pro units gives up to 8 colors. ACE Pro also dries filament (dual PTC, up to ~55C internal). NFC/RFID intelligent filament ID on Anycubic spools auto-sets slicer params. TPU is single-color only (not ACE Pro compatible). Color changes use a purge/prime tower (notable waste). Slicer: Anycubic Slicer Next (OrcaSlicer fork) or OrcaSlicer/Cura. 1.75mm filament.

printers.bed_type: Dual-sided PEI magnetic flexible spring-steel plate (enclosed chamber, PC door/top)
printers.notes: Anycubic's first CoreXY printer; fully enclosed. Max 600 mm/s, recommended ~300 mm/s, accel up to 20,000 mm/s^2. Quick-release proprietary nozzle/hotend (custom, not standard volcano/MK8). Layer-height hardware range 0.05-0.28mm (0.08mm min in stock OrcaSlicer profiles for 0.4 nozzle). Multi-color via Anycubic ACE Pro color box: 4 spools = 4 colors; two ACE Pro units chained = up to 8 colors. ACE Pro also dries filament. TPU single-color only (not ACE Pro compatible). Built-in camera, AI spaghetti/first-layer detection, activated-carbon filtration. Heavy purge waste in multicolor. Slicer: Anycubic Slicer Next (OrcaSlicer fork). Note: OrcaSlicer upstream also ships a 'Kobra S1 Max' (larger) with its own 0.25/0.4 nozzle presets - distinct machine. 1.75mm filament.

MSLA (LCD) resin printer. 10.1-inch 12K mono LCD, 11520 x 5120 px. XY resolution ~19 x 24 micron pixel (19um X / 24um Y). First leveling-free 12K consumer resin printer (sensor + hidden-spring auto leveling). LED-matrix UV light source, double linear-rail Z axis (10um precision), laser-engraved aluminum build plate, 4.3-inch touchscreen, USB + WiFi (Anycubic app). Speed up to ~105 mm/h with high-speed resin (70 mm/h general). Anycubic rates the printer at a 0.1mm test layer height; common production default is 0.05mm. RESIN PROCESS: single-material, NO AMS / no multi-color; supports required; IPA wash + UV cure post-processing. Layer height 0.01-0.15mm set in slicer (Anycubic Photon Workshop or ChituBox). Preset names above are representative defaults. NOTE: distinct from plain Mono M5 (no auto-level) and the newer M5s Pro (14K).

printers.bed_type: Textured PEI plate (also supports Smooth/Cool Plate, High-Temp, Dual-Texture PEI); heated to 100C
printers.notes: 256x256x256 mm open-frame bed-slinger (CoreXY-style cantilever; Steel + extruded aluminum chassis). Default 0.4mm stainless steel nozzle, optional 0.2/0.6/0.8mm. Native multicolor via a single AMS lite = 4 colors (AMS lite cannot be chained). With the AMS HUB (SA013) accessory the A1 can instead drive up to 4 enclosed AMS / AMS 2 Pro / AMS HT units (up to 16 colors). The 0.4-nozzle quality process presets carry the verbatim '@BBL A1' suffix shown here (pulled from the Bambu Studio profile repo). Additional 0.2-nozzle (e.g. '0.06mm Fine @BBL A1 0.2 nozzle', '0.08mm Extra Fine'), 0.6-nozzle and 0.8-nozzle preset sets also exist. Max toolhead speed 500 mm/s, 10,000 mm/s^2. Open frame: not ideal for ABS/ASA/PC/PA. 1.75mm filament.

printers.bed_type: Textured PEI plate (also Cool Plate / others); heated to 80C max (low-power fanless PSU limit)
printers.notes: 180x180x180 mm open-frame cantilever bed-slinger. Smaller sibling of the A1. Default 0.4mm stainless steel nozzle, optional 0.2/0.6/0.8mm. Max bed temp is only 80C (vs 100C on the A1) due to a low-power fanless power supply, so it is limited to low-temp materials (PLA/PETG/TPU) and is not recommended for ABS/ASA/PC/PA. Multicolor via a single AMS lite = 4 colors max; AMS lite cannot be chained. An AMS HUB (SA013) lets it use enclosed AMS / AMS 2 Pro / AMS HT (up to 4 units) for more colors. Quality process presets use the internal '@BBL A1M' suffix (Bambu Studio repo). Max toolhead speed 500 mm/s, 10,000 mm/s^2. Silent mode ~48 dB. 1.75mm filament.

printers.bed_type: Textured PEI plate and Smooth PEI plate; heated up to 120C; actively heated chamber up to 65C
printers.notes: Flagship DUAL-NOZZLE CoreXY, Bambu's largest build volume. Build volume is configuration-dependent: 325x320x325 mm single-nozzle 3D printing; 300x320x325 mm dual-nozzle; total cross-nozzle volume 350x320x325 mm. Two independent hotends (each default 0.4mm hardened steel; optional 0.2/0.6/0.8mm), max nozzle 350C; standard-flow hotend ~40 mm^3/s, optional high-flow ~65 mm^3/s. Max bed 120C, actively heated chamber up to 65C for CF/GF composites. Multicolor via the new AMS 2 Pro (integrated drying): 4 colors per unit, up to 4 units = 16 colors. Optional 10W / 40W laser + cutting modules. 1000 mm/s toolhead, 20,000 mm/s^2; vision-assisted encoder ~50um motion accuracy; 15 filament-flow sensors. NOTE: the H2D's '@BBL H2D' presets use a different naming scheme than the X/P/A series - 'Standard / Balanced Quality / Balanced Strength / Fine / Extra Fine' rather than 'Optimal/Strength/Draft'. The internal preset suffix is '@BBL H2D' (the H2D Pro uses a parallel '@BBL H2DP' set). 1.75mm filament. A separate H2D Pro variant exists with the same build volumes.

printers.bed_type: Textured PEI plate (also Cool Plate / Engineering plate); heated to 100C
printers.notes: 256x256x256 mm enclosed-capable CoreXY (P1P ships open-frame / panel-less but is the same core as P1S). Default 0.4mm stainless nozzle, optional 0.2/0.6/0.8mm. Max nozzle 300C, max bed 100C. Multicolor via the standard enclosed AMS: 1 unit = 4 colors, up to 4 AMS chained = 16 colors. AMS lite is NOT compatible with P-series. The P1P has its own '@BBL P1P' process preset set (Bambu Studio repo), with the identical layer-height lineup to the X1C set. Max toolhead speed 500 mm/s, 20,000 mm/s^2. 1.75mm filament.

printers.bed_type: Textured PEI plate (also Cool / Engineering / High-Temp plates); heated to 100C
printers.notes: 256x256x256 mm FULLY ENCLOSED CoreXY (enclosed + activated-carbon filter version of the P1P). Default 0.4mm stainless nozzle, optional 0.2/0.6/0.8mm. Max nozzle 300C, max bed 100C. IMPORTANT preset naming: the P1S has no '@BBL P1S' process set of its own; in Bambu Studio it inherits and displays the X1C presets verbatim (its machine config sets default_print_profile = '0.20mm Standard @BBL X1C', and the X1C process profiles list 'Bambu Lab P1S 0.4 nozzle' as a compatible_printer). So the exact preset names a P1S user sees are the '@BBL X1C' names listed here. Multicolor via standard enclosed AMS: 4 colors per unit, up to 4 = 16. AMS lite NOT compatible. Max toolhead 500 mm/s, 20,000 mm/s^2. 1.75mm.

printers.bed_type: Textured PEI plate (also Cool / Engineering / High-Temp plates); heated, up to 120C @110V (110C @220V)
printers.notes: 256x256x256 mm enclosed flagship CoreXY with Micro Lidar (first-layer inspection / flow calibration) and hardened-steel nozzle/extruder for abrasive composites. Default 0.4mm hardened steel nozzle, optional 0.2/0.6/0.8mm. Max nozzle 300C. Max bed temp is voltage-dependent: 120C on 110V mains, 110C on 220V. These '@BBL X1C' quality process presets are the canonical set (verbatim from Bambu Studio repo) and are also shared/inherited by the X1, P1S and X1E. Multicolor via standard enclosed AMS: 4 colors per unit, up to 4 AMS = 16 colors. AMS lite NOT compatible. Max toolhead 500 mm/s, 20,000 mm/s^2. 1.75mm filament.

printers.bed_type: Textured PEI / Engineering / High-Temp plates; heated up to ~120C; plus active heated chamber control 40-60C
printers.notes: 256x256x256 mm enterprise/engineering variant of the X1C. Single-nozzle CoreXY (NOT dual-nozzle - dual is H2-series only). Higher 320C max nozzle (all-metal hotend + hardened steel) for high-temp engineering composites (PPA-CF/GF, PPS, PPS-CF), plus an actively heated chamber settable 40-60C. Default 0.4mm hardened nozzle, optional 0.2/0.6/0.8mm. Adds secure enterprise connectivity (Ethernet, WPA2-Enterprise, kill switch, full LAN-only/cloud-free operation) and triple-stage VOC/particulate filtration. PRESET NAMING: the X1E has its own machine configs but its default_print_profile = '0.20mm Standard @BBL X1C' and it is a compatible_printer of the X1C process profiles, so in Bambu Studio it shows the '@BBL X1C' preset names listed here. Multicolor via standard enclosed AMS: 4 per unit, up to 4 = 16. AMS lite NOT compatible. Max toolhead 500 mm/s, 20,000 mm/s^2.

printers.bed_type: PEI-coated flexible spring-steel build plate
printers.notes: Top-tier Ender-3 V3 (released Feb 2024). Open-frame CoreXZ motion system (XZ co-driven by two base-mounted motors), 600 mm/s burst max / 20000 mm/s^2, automatic belt tensioning. All-metal 300C hotend and 110C bed enable engineering materials including carbon-fiber blends. Dual-gear Sprite direct extruder, auto-leveling, input shaping (G-sensor). Single-color. Sliced via Creality Print; OrcaSlicer tiers follow the standard fine/optimal/standard/draft ladder for the 0.4 nozzle.

printers.bed_type: PEI-coated flexible spring-steel build plate
printers.notes: Mid-range Klipper-firmware bed-slinger (Cartesian) released fall 2023. 500 mm/s max / 8000 mm/s^2. 60W ceramic-heater hotend with bi-metal (copper+titanium-alloy) heatbreak and copper nozzle reaching 300C; bed max 100C. Sprite direct-drive extruder, CR-Touch auto-leveling + strain-gauge auto Z-offset, Wi-Fi, 4.3in touchscreen. Single-color. Nozzle swaps to 0.6/0.8mm supported via Creality K1/KE-compatible nozzle kits.

printers.bed_type: PC-coated spring-steel flexible build plate
printers.notes: Budget entry-level bed-slinger (Cartesian) released fall 2023. 250 mm/s max / 2500 mm/s^2. Standard hotend limited to 260C; PC-coated bed max 100C, so it targets low-temp materials (PLA/PETG/TPU). Sprite direct-drive extruder, CR-Touch + dual strain-gauge auto-leveling and auto Z-offset, 3.2in color screen with knob (no Wi-Fi). Single 0.4mm nozzle, single-color.

printers.bed_type: Flexible PEI-coated spring steel build plate (magnetic, removable)
printers.notes: Enclosed CoreXY high-speed printer (600 mm/s max, 20000 mm/s^2). 300C ceramic-heater hotend with titanium-alloy heatbreak and hardened-steel nozzle; 32 mm^3/s flow. Single-color only. Sliced via Creality Print (official); OrcaSlicer profiles use the '0.XXmm <tier> @Creality K1 (0.4 nozzle)' naming convention. The K1C variant adds a tri-metal nozzle for carbon-fiber/composite. Bed (PEI) max is 100C. OrcaSlicer process tiers follow the standard fine/optimal/standard/draft ladder at 0.12/0.16/0.20/0.28mm.

printers.bed_type: Flexible aluminum spring-steel build plate (smooth coated standard; textured PEI optional)
printers.notes: Larger enclosed CoreXY sibling of the K1 with 300x300x300mm volume, AI LiDAR first-layer scanning and chamber AI camera, 600 mm/s max / 20000 mm/s^2. Hotend reaches 300C (ceramic heater, titanium-alloy heatbreak, hardened-steel nozzle). Heatbed reaches 60C in ~90s, max 120C. Single-color only (no AMS/CFS). Exact OrcaSlicer process preset confirmed as '0.20mm Standard @Creality K1Max (0.4 nozzle)' (preset id GP004), inheriting fdm_process_creality_common; other tiers follow the standard fine/optimal/standard/draft ladder.

printers.bed_type: Flexible spring-steel build plate; actively heated enclosed chamber up to 60C
printers.notes: Flagship large-format enclosed CoreXY multicolor printer (350x350x350mm). High-flow Apus dual-gear direct-drive extruder, tri-metal hardened-steel 350C nozzle, 40 mm^3/s flow, 600 mm/s max / 30000 mm/s^2. Actively heated chamber to 60C, heatbed to 120C. Multicolor via CFS: each CFS unit holds 4 x 1kg spools; up to 4 CFS units chained = up to 16 colors. CFS supports PLA/PETG/ABS/ASA/PA-CF but NOT TPU or damp PVA/BVOH (TPU printed from external spool holder). Layer-height range 0.05-0.3mm. Two AI cameras (chamber spaghetti detection + toolhead flow). Released Nov 11, 2024.

printers.bed_type: Magnetic dual-sided flexible plate: textured PEI one side, PLA cool-adhesion coating other side; 1000W AC heater
printers.notes: Budget enclosed CoreXY (launched ~$295). 256x256x256mm, 500 mm/s / 20000 mm/s^2, 32 mm^3/s flow. Direct-drive hardened-steel dual-gear extruder (5.2:1), all-metal hotend with hardened-steel 320C nozzle (supports PLA-CF and abrasives). Bed heated by 1000W AC heater to 110C; ventilated/filtered enclosure but NO active chamber heater. NO native multicolor: the teased four-color add-on (originally 'Q3 2025') was walked back; as of Jan 2026 Elegoo finished the hardware design but had not released firmware/product, and offered owners compensation coupons. For built-in multicolor buy the newer Centauri Carbon 2 Combo (CANVAS system, 4 colors, 350C nozzle). 8GB storage, dual-band Wi-Fi, OTA. Sliced via Elegoo's OrcaSlicer-based slicer.

MSLA (LCD) resin printer. 7-inch 9K mono LCD, 8520 x 4320 px. XY resolution ~18 x 18 micron pixel. COB light source (92% uniformity), Tilt Release tilting-vat mechanism for fast peel, up to ~150 mm/h. AI camera monitoring, one-click auto-leveling, smart resin detection, 4.0-inch touchscreen, WiFi/USB. RESIN PROCESS: single-material, NO AMS / no multi-color; supports required for most models; requires IPA wash + UV cure post-processing. Typical/default layer height 0.05mm (50 micron); 0.01-0.10mm range set in slicer. Ships with ChituBox. NOTE: this is the Mars 5 ULTRA (9K). The plain Mars 5 is a separate, lower-spec model: 4K LCD, ~35 micron XY, ~143.43 x 89.6 x 150mm build volume. Preset names above are representative slicer defaults.

printers.bed_type: Flexible textured PEI-coated spring-steel build plate
printers.notes: Open-frame Cartesian bed-slinger with pre-installed Klipper firmware, ARM 64-bit quad-core. 500 mm/s max, input shaping + pressure advance. 300C extended brass hotend (0.4mm; ships with 2 spare brass nozzles). 121-point auto bed leveling, dual-gear direct extruder (5.2:1). Single-color. Sliced via Elegoo Cura (ELEGOO slicer) or community OrcaSlicer profiles; tiers follow standard fine/standard/draft ladder. Bed max 110C.

printers.bed_type: Dual-sided flexible spring-steel plate (PLA-specific coating one side, textured PEI other side); segmented zone-heating bed
printers.notes: Pro version of the Neptune 4 with the same 225x225x265mm volume but upgraded cooling (2 side fans + 4 rear auxiliary fans) and a smart segmented zone-heating heatbed (110C max) for faster heat-up / lower power. 500 mm/s max / 20000 mm/s^2 (highest acceleration in the N4 line), Klipper, 121-point auto-leveling, dual-gear direct extruder (5.2:1), 300C hotend, 0.4mm brass nozzle. Dual-sided plate: PLA coating + textured PEI. Single-color.

MSLA (LCD) resin printer. 10-inch 12K mono LCD, 11520 x 5120 px. XY resolution ~19 x 24 micron (19um X / 24um Y pixel). 405nm COB light source with Fresnel collimating lens (92% uniformity). Tilting-vat (Tilt Release) mechanism cuts peel force for faster prints, up to ~150 mm/h. Crystal-clear PFA release film, laser-etched build plate (no flexible plate). RESIN PROCESS: single-material only, NO AMS / no multi-color. Models almost always require support structures (generated in slicer) plus post-wash (IPA) and UV cure. Typical/default layer height 0.05mm (50 micron); range 0.01-0.10mm set entirely in slicer, not hardware. Ships with ChituBox Basic; Elegoo's own slicer is Voxeldance Tango / Satellite. Layer-height preset names above are representative slicer defaults, not fixed hardware profiles.

Professional MSLA printer using Formlabs' proprietary Low Force Display (LFD) print engine (LCD masking + collimated SLA-class light). Build volume 200 x 125 x 210mm (5.25 L). XY resolution 50 micron pixel with advanced pixel/sub-pixel smoothing. Layer thickness range 25-300 micron (0.025-0.300mm), set per-material in PreForm slicer; 100 micron (0.10mm) is the common default. Average speed ~40 mm/h at 100um, max ~100 mm/h. 60-LED backlight unit + collimating lenses; flexible-film resin tank, ~75,000+ layers tank life. RESIN PROCESS: single-material, NO AMS / no multi-color; supports auto-generated in PreForm; requires Form Wash (IPA/solvent) + Form Cure post-processing. Material-specific validated profiles (Grey V5, Clear V5, Black V5, White V5, Fast Model V1, plus engineering/dental/biocompatible resins) ship in PreForm - layer-height options above are the standard PreForm settings, gated by the selected resin. Form 4B variant adds biocompatible/medical resins. 1L = ~litres of build space.

printers.bed_type: Magnetic heatbed with removable PEI spring steel sheets (smooth/textured/satin); ships with textured PEI
printers.notes: Fully-enclosed CoreXY with active chamber temperature control (chamber up to ~55C). Now sold as CORE One+ (PrusaSlicer model name 'Prusa CORE One && CORE One+'). Build volume 250x220x270 mm (30% more volume than an MK4S, in ~50% less desk footprint). Ships standard with a high-flow Nextruder 0.4mm nozzle (HF0.4); toolless nozzle swap 0.25-0.8mm. 290C nozzle / 120C bed stock; an optional 400C hotend upgrade enables PEKK-CF, PPS-CF, PSU, PPA. Newer profile naming adds BALANCED presets and HF-only 0.25mm SPEED / 0.28mm DRAFT. Larger sibling 'CORE One L' has a 300x300x330 mm build volume and 60C chamber. MMU3 5-color supported.

printers.bed_type: Removable magnetic spring steel sheets (smooth/textured/satin), heatbed with cold-corner compensation
printers.notes: Smallest Prusa FDM printer; cantilever Cartesian design with single Bowden-style extruder. Lower max temps than the MK-line: 280C nozzle / 100C bed (PLA/PETG/ASA/ABS/TPU range). With Input Shaper firmware it slices with the @MINIIS profiles (SPEED/STRUCTURAL/FAST DETAIL naming). MMU3 multi-material is NOT supported on the MINI+ (single color/material only). No standard enclosure.

printers.bed_type: Magnetic heatbed with removable PEI spring steel sheets (smooth/textured/satin); ships with satin PEI (original MK4)
printers.notes: Original MK4 (pre-Input-Shaper firmware / pre-MK4S). PrusaSlicer profiles use the legacy @MK4 token with the older QUALITY/DETAIL/ULTRADETAIL/DRAFT naming (distinct from the @MK4IS SPEED/STRUCTURAL scheme used by the MK4S). Upgradeable to MK4S via the Nextruder HF upgrade kit; once on MK4S firmware it slices with the @MK4IS profiles. Same 250x210x220 build volume, 290C nozzle, 120C bed, and MMU3 5-color support as the MK4S. Cartesian i3 bed-slinger, open frame.

printers.bed_type: Magnetic heatbed with removable PEI spring steel sheets (smooth/textured/satin); ships with smooth PEI
printers.notes: Input Shaper firmware printer; PrusaSlicer profiles use the @MK4IS token (the MK4S is the firmware/HW-revised MK4 and shares the same profile model). Ships standard with a high-flow Prusa CHT brass 0.4mm nozzle; standard (non-HF) 0.4mm nozzle is recommended for MMU3 multi-material (best speed/lowest waste). 290C nozzle / 120C bed. The 0.25mm SPEED and 0.28mm DRAFT presets require the high-flow (HF0.4) nozzle. Toolless nozzle swap. Cartesian i3 (bed-slinger), open frame; an optional enclosure is sold separately.

printers.bed_type: Segmented heatbed with 16 individually controlled tiles; removable magnetic spring steel sheets (smooth/textured/satin); ships with satin PEI
printers.notes: Five-toolhead toolchanger flagship (PrusaSlicer model 'Original Prusa XL - 5T Input Shaper', token @XL5IS; shares the @XLIS print profiles). Each of the 5 independent Nextruder toolheads holds its own filament/nozzle, giving true 5-material/5-color printing with per-tool calibration and no purge tower between most changes - distinct from MMU3 (which is single-nozzle multiplexing). Dual-tool (XL2IS) variant also exists. 360x360x360 build volume, segmented 16-zone heatbed, 290C nozzle / 120C bed. Multi-tool enables soluble/breakaway support interfaces (dedicated support material in a separate tool). 'Max colors' = 5 (one per tool).

printers.bed_type: Segmented heatbed with 16 individually controlled tiles; removable magnetic spring steel sheets (smooth/textured/satin); ships with satin PEI
printers.notes: Large-format CoreXY with a unique segmented 16-zone (16-tile) heatbed and load-cell Nextruder. Single-tool variant carries one toolhead = one material. PrusaSlicer model token @XLIS (Input Shaper). 360x360x360 mm build volume, 290C nozzle / 120C bed. Uses a true toolchanger architecture rather than MMU3 for multi-material (see 5-tool variant). HF0.4 nozzle unlocks 0.25mm SPEED and 0.28mm DRAFT presets. Optional enclosure available.
